subcodes.first_line: Lo, the Book proclaimeth: "The Kingdom is God's, Lord of all worlds!" and all things cry out: "The Truth hath appeared and the Cause is in God's hands!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الکتاب ینادی الملک لله رب العالمین و الاشیاء تصیح قد ظهر الحق و الامر بید الله
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
